svg.title: Enterprise-Grade Data Security and Compliance Architecture
svg.desc: A boundary gateway that inspects, masks, approves, or blocks outbound calls to third-party APIs and large language model providers.
svg.text: Enterprise-Grade Data Security and Compliance Architecture
How a boundary gateway controls and inspects outbound data when calling third-party APIs or large language models

text.tspan: Secure gateway acts as the single
exit point for all outbound data
